description: A self-attention diagram showing a sequence of tokens where each token connects to every other token with weighted links, visualizing how attention scores distribute across the input for each word.
teaching_value: Helps students see that attention is a learned, dense weighting over all tokens (not a single alignment), clarifying how a model can emphasize relevant context words differently for each query word.
when_to_show: Use when introducing attention to explain that each word computes weights over all words; revisit when students confuse attention with hard selection or one-to-one alignment.
suggested_caption: Self-attention: each token weights all others (Jay Alammar).
